headline: FirstEnergy Names Jennifer Lawless to Lead Learning and Development, Supporting Ongoing Cultural Transformation
summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) has named Jennifer Lawless Vice President, Enterprise Learning as it advances its culture of continuous performance improvement that supports employee growth, reliable service for customers and the company's long-term success.

headline: FirstEnergy Names Brian Harrell to Lead Enterprise Security
summary: As U.S. utilities confront an increasingly complex landscape of cyber and physical security threats, FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) has appointed Brian Harrell, a former senior U.S. homeland security official, as Vice President and Chief Security Officer.

raw.headline: FirstEnergy Names Brian Harrell to Lead Enterprise Security

headline: FirstEnergy Corp (FE) – Price Target Raised to $54
summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE:FE) is included among the 15 Utility Stocks with Highest Dividends. FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE:FE)’s electric distribution companies form one of America’s largest investor-owned electric systems, serving more than 6 million customers in Ohio, Pennsylvania, New Jersey, West Virginia, Maryland, and New York.
